message: just got done with it, dad. 👍
glad you remembered to take out the trash... good job on that... now don't forget to mow the lawn this weekend... it's getting a bit long...
dude, i'm not a kid anymore, can't i just take care of it without reminders? 😂
sorry alex... just trying to help... lawn care is important... dont wanna be that house on the block with the overgrown grass...
dude, we're fine, mom's okay ,can we focus on that instead of the lawn? 🙄
oh right... mom... sorry about that... how is she doing...?
she's a bit shaken up but otherwise okay, just a minor cut and some bruises. we're gonna get her checked out by a doctor just in case, but everything seems fine
glad to hear mom's okay... take care of her for me... and don't forget to check the oil in the car... it's been a while...
dad, seriously, the oil's fine, we just got it serviced last week... can we drop the reminders now? 😂
ok... sorry about that... just want to make sure everything is taken care of... including the lawn... can you please mow it this weekend?
dad, can we just fcous on mom's recovery for now? we can discuss the lawn later...
yeah, let's focus on mom, okay? love you, bye
okay... love you too... will talk to you soon... have to fix the sprinkler head in the front yard... water's been spraying everywhere...
dude, seriously, mom's in the hospital, can we please just focus on that for now?!
just got the call... we need to go to the hospital now... hurry up
finally, let's go, i'm on my way
almost there... traffic's a nightmare... hope mom's okay... love, Dad
just got stuck in a traffic jam... my car's battery's almost dead... should've gotten it serviced last week...
dude, focus on mom, not your car! can you just make it to the hospital before we get there?
almost there... battery's dead... hope it starts when we get close to the hospital... love, Dad
seriously, dad, just call a tow truck or something and get to the hospital, mom's waiting! 🙄
don't worry, i've called a tow truck... they said they'll bring a jump starter... hopefully it'll work... love, Dad
ok, just make sure you're safe and we'll see you when you get there, don't worry about the car, mom's the priority
just talked to the tow truck guy... he said they're 20 minutes away... hopefully they can get the car started by then...
dad, just go to the hospital, the car is the least of our worries right now, let's focus on mom's condition
okay okay, don't worry about the car, we'll deal with it later, we have to see mom now, hopefully the tow truck guy can jump start it, love, Dad
dude, just go to the hospital, we can deal with the car later, let's go
okay, i'm turning the car off now, so it doesn't die completely, we'll deal with it when we get back, love, Dad
finally, just get to the hospital and we'll talk when you get there, don't worry about the car, seriously
just parkedt he car... now i'm getting in... see you soon... Love, Dad
just got out of the car and my back hurts from getting out... hope mom is okay...
dude, stop complaining about your back, we're at the hospital, let's go see mom
my back hurts from getting out of the car... now my knee hurts from walking to the hospital... hopefully mom is okay...
dude, seriously, stop with the back and knee complaints, mom's in trouble, let's go
i'm almost there... and my other knee just started hurting too... Love, Dad
dad, focus, we're almost at the hospital, stop with the complaining and let's go see mom
just walked up the steps and my back is killing m.e.. why do these hospital steps have to be so steep... Love, Dad
dude, seriously, stop whining, we're here, let's go see mom before it's too late, okay?!
dude, come on, she's waiting for us, stop complaining and let's go already!
okay... okay... i'm coming... just need to stop and take some deep breaths... Love, Dad
dad, we're at the entrance, just follow me, come on!
finally, come on, let's go, we can't waste any more time, mom's waiting for us!
ok... i'm right behind you... just need to take one more deep breath... dont want to fall on the way to mom... Love, Dad
dude, seriously, just walk, you're killing me!
almost there... just need to get my phone to work properly... cant seem to get the right button... Love, Dad
dude, just put the phone in your pocketa nd walk, come on!
okay... just did that... still having trouble with this thing... cant seem to get the right screen... will be there soon... Love, Dad
seriously dad, just go, i'll meet you at the hospital, don't worry about the phone
okay... will do... just need to get the car started... dont want to leave it idling... Love, Dad
dude, mom's condition just took a turn for the worse, we need to get there SAAP, just leave the car, i'll drive, come on!
okay... will drive then... dont want to waste any more time... see you at the hospital... Love, Dad
just go, dont worrya bout the car, i'll deal with it, mom needs us now
ok... just got out of the car... will be there in 5 mins... dont worry about the car... see you at the hospital... Love, Dad
dude, mom's in the middle of a procedure, just get here, dont worry about the car, i'll deal
just got stuck in traffic... going to take a bit longer... Love, Dad
dude, seriously, just get here, we can worry about the car later, mom's life is more important than a parking spot 🤯
ok... almost there... had to pull over and let a bunch of cars pass me... my heart's racing too... see you soon... Love, Dad
just got to the hospital... parking was a nightmare... cant find the elevator... will be there asap... Love, Dad
dude, just get to the ICU, i'm in room 314, don't worry about hte parking spot, just come find me, mom's gonna be done soon
ok... finally found the elevator... going to ICU now... will come to room 314... Love, Dad
glad you finally made it, just get here already, mom's almost done with the surgery 😂
finally found room 314... will be there in 5 min... see you and mom soon... Love, Dad
hey, just talked to mom, she's gonna be a while, don't worry if you're a few minutes late, we'll be here 😊
taking a detour to the hospital cafeteria... need to grab a cup of coffee... traffic is backed up... Love, Dad
dude, the cafeteria? really? mom's still in surgery, can't you just come see me instead?
oh... right... coffee can wait... on my way to your room now... see you soon... Love, Dad
just got the xray results, nothing's broken, but i'm still pretty sore, and mom's still in surgery, btw, don't forget to see me
almost there... just had to stop for a minute... my car's been making a weird noise... think it might need an oil change... see you soon...
dad, seriously, just get here already! mom's still in surgery and i'm still in pain... just drive and worry about the car later
okay okay... i'm turning in... car can wait... love you and see you soon... Love, Dad
finally made it to the hospital, where's the room?
room 214... on the second floor... just got lost in the parking garage... found the elevator... going up now...
dude, you're literally 2 floors away... just take the stairs... come on
okay okay... stairs it is... see you soon... Love, Dad
dude, hurry up already! i'm still waiting for you... and btw, take the elevator back down to the cafeteria and grab me a coffee, i'm satrving
heading down to hte cafeteria... got turned around again... which way is the elevator... Love, Dad
seriously dad? just look at the signs or ask someone for help... and btw, i said starveING not satrving... and get me a pastry too
just got back to your room... elevator was on the left... got your coffee and a croissant... see you soon... Love, Dad
dude, you finally made it... now can you please take a look at the x-rays and tell me what's going on? 🤔
doctor just came in... says you have a bad sprain... going to have to keep you here for a few days... also, did you take care of the lawn while I was away?
dude, focus on the hospital visit for now, can we talk about the lawn later?

had to get a new coffee because the one i got spilled all over my shirt... anyway, doctor says they might have to do surgery on your ankle... and, btw, did you remember to change the oil in your car?... Love, Dad
dude, seriously, can you please just focus on my health right now? surgery? oil in the car? can't you just give me 5 minutes of peace?

oh, sorry alex... just trying to take care of everything... surgery is just a precaution... doctor said they'll know more after they do some more tests... and, by the way, did you water the plants while i was away... Love, Dad
dad, can we please just talk about my ankle and the hospital visit for the next 5 minutes without you bringing up thel awn, car, or plants? 🙄
okay okay... sorry alex... just want to make sure you're okay... will come see you soon... Love, Dad
thanks, dad, i really appreciate it... see you soon

i was just thinking... maybe you could have me take care of the lawn for a bit... it's getting a little long... and, btw, what time is your doctor's appointment... i'll try to be there for that... Love, Dad
dad, seriously, can't you just drop it about the lawn? i'm trying to rest here... just come visit me andd on't bring it up, okay? 😂
okay okay alex... will just drop it about the lawn... see you soon... Love, Dad
btw, my doctor's appointment is in 2 hours, so try to be here before then, okay?
